Calendar Girls (2003)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $31,011,616Details
International Box Office $62,063,000
Worldwide Box Office $93,074,616
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$151,393 (0.5% of total gross)
Legs:6.99 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:33.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$10,000,000 (worldwide box office is 9.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:24 opening theaters/967 max. theaters, 8.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $59,870,731

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 19th, 2003 (Limited) by Walt Disney
International Releases: October 9th, 2003 (Wide) (Australia)
MPA Rating: PG-13 for nudity, some language and drug-related material.
Running Time: 108 minutes
Plot point: Cancer, Charities
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Touchstone Pictures, Harbour Pictures
Production Countries: United Kingdom, United States
Languages: English
